# The Clash of Civilizations (Huntington 1996)

The Clash of Civilizations (Huntington 1996) is an important reference in history and geopolitics. Closely related to [[globalization]], [[cold-war]]. These connections reflect important links in the knowledge network. Understanding these relationships helps build a comprehensive knowledge graph.
